Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Union]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The Union is a military/political entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Union is a group from which ships can be borrowed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Union allowed Professor Vallenar to be at the Magic Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Union is a location or entity that can be traveled deeper into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Aethril are part of the Union.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Information from the Union is considered scarce by Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Union is a group mentioned by Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The narrator materializes on the bridge of a Union battleship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Sola has contacts within the Union.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Rifles issued by the Union are magically shielded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Union treats certain planet contact losses as Iron Legion attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — A fleet of Union forces accompanied the Titan Knights.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The characters are discussing the Union military.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice has influence over everyone in the Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — The Union is a group or entity mentioned in relation to the Zenith Starship's destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — The Union has insurrectionist elements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — The Union has been fighting the Iron Legion for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala and her fellow students are now Union fugitives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Union has ships that are firing on The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — The Union is a business or entity being questioned in relation to Karosha.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
